title: BJJ Zürich - BJJ Lab Zürich
text: HOW TO START? BJJ ZÜRICH LEARN BRAZILIAN JIU JITSU IN ZÜRICH Join our basic course to learn BJJ together with other people who are new to the sport. LEARN MORE SCHEDULE YOUR INTRO CLASS Jiu Jitsu is more than a sport, it’s a lifestyle and we want to share that with you. Join us for an unforgettable experience and become part of the BJJ Zürich community. New to BJJ? Check out our beginner guide. SCHEDULE NOW OUR MISSION Make high level grappling accessible to everyone Watch the video OUR LOCATION A modern Brazilian Jiu Jitsu (BJJ) gym in Zürich Oerlikon. LEARN MORE ABOUT THE BJJ LAB OUR PROGRAMS Jiu Jitsu Kids Jiu Jitsu Basic Course Jiu Jitsu Fundamentals Jiu Jitsu Advanced OUR SCHEDULE We offer classes every day, including morning, lunch, evening and weekend classes. All our instructors are GrapplingCoach certified, ensuring that you receive top-quality instruction. You can be confident that you are in good hands when you are training Jiu Jitsu with us. MEET OUR TEAM 🥉for Rael at the IBJJF World Championship! Repr Armin got his well-deserved purple belt, congratul Michael got his well-deserved brown belt. He’s Onur got his blue belt. Congratulations! He has no 🥉for Alex at the IBJJF Master Europe Championsh 🥇🥉for @lucacag at the IBJJF Master Europe Ch Load More Follow us on Instagram EXCELLENT Based on 122 reviews Angel Riwar 4. September, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Schon bei meinem ersten Besuch wurde ich herzlich aufgenommen. Die Klassen sind sehr gut aufgebaut, verständlich erklärt und bieten eine tolle Lernatmosphäre. Besonders gefällt mir, dass es jeden Tag mindestens drei Klassen zu verschiedenen Zeiten gibt – so findet wirklich jeder die Möglichkeit zu trainieren. Die Leute im Lab sind freundlich, hilfsbereit und schaffen ein super Gemeinschaftsgefühl. Auch die Hygiene ist top: Die Matten werden nach jeder Klasse gereinigt und die Duschen sind immer sauber. Ich kann das Lab jedem wärmstens empfehlen, der in der Region Zürich (Oerlikon, Seebach, Affoltern, Glatttal, Hardbrücke, Schwamendingen) trainieren möchte. Robin Rob 6. August, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Super Coaches. Trainings sind sehr strukturiert! Es ist sehr sauber und freundliche Atmosphäre. Für das grosse Angebot ein sehr fairer Preis💪🏼 Jonathan Vallentin 27. July, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Great gym! Really friendly coach and training partners Sve Jo 16. July, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. I really like this gym, it’s as simple as that! There is the knowledgable and welcoming teacher (Joonas), an international mix of tough people to roll (and laugh with) and a really convenient location and clean facilities! Combined with a great flexible schedule (so you don’ have to spend time with your family) and Swiss level clean mats, it ticks all my boxes. I really enjoyed my time and I will stop by again when I visit my 'Heimat'. Oss! Lucas Graf 15. July, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Excellent gym with a very well-structured curriculum that makes learning clear and progressive. The facilities are spotless, and hygiene is clearly a top priority. Friendly vibe, high-level instruction—great for all levels. Highly recommended! Tadeáš Janoušek 26. June, 2025. Trustindex verifies that the original source of the review is Google. Awesome BJJ gym with skilled coaches and a super welcoming vibe. Great place to learn, train, and grow — whether you’re a beginner or experienced. Highly recommend!
